C.rule: Start at 16; successive increments are fourth powers of consecutive primes

D.rule: Exact continuation of the associated combinatorial recurrence
Start at 16 and add successive squares of primes 3,5,7,...
a(n)=n·a(n-1)+(-1)^n p_n, with p_n the nth prime
Odd positions are Catalan numbers; even positions are powers of 3
a(n)=n^5+p_n, where p_n is the nth prime
